questions.promptEn: I am a large reptile. I live near rivers and swamps. My body is covered with scales. I have sharp teeth and a powerful tail. I look like a crocodile, but my snout is wider and rounder. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 大きな はちゅうるい。川や沼の近くにすむ。クロコダイルに似ているけど、口先が広く丸い。

questions.promptEn: I am a bird, but I do not fly. I swim very well and live in cold places. My body is black and white. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 鳥だけど飛ばない。泳ぐのが上手。寒いところにすむ。

questions.promptEn: I am the largest animal on land. I have big ears, thick legs, and a long trunk that I use like a hand. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 陸の上でいちばん大きな動物。長い鼻を手のように使う。

questions.promptEn: I am long and curved. I grow in a bunch with many others. I am green before I am ready, and yellow when you usually eat me. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 細長くて曲がっている。何本もくっついて育つ。緑から黄色になる。

questions.promptEn: I am small, red, and sweet. My seeds are on the outside, not hidden inside. People often eat me with cake or cream. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 小さくて赤くて甘い。種が外側についている。ケーキにもよく使う。

questions.promptEn: I carry many people at once. I move on rails, stop at stations, and I am usually longer than a car. What am I?
questions.hintJp: たくさんの人を運ぶ。線路の上を走る。駅に止まる。

questions.promptEn: You see me in the sky at night. I do not make my own light, but I look bright because sunlight shines on me. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 夜の空に見える。自分で光っているのではなく、太陽の光で明るく見える。

questions.promptEn: I grow from a plant. I can be many colors and often smell nice. Bees visit me to collect nectar. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 植物から咲く。いろいろな色がある。ミツバチが蜜を集めにくる。

questions.storyEn: Some reptiles live both on land and near water. An alligator has a wide, rounded snout, strong jaws, and a powerful tail. It is often confused with a crocodile, but they are not exactly the same.
questions.questionEn: Which animal has a wide, rounded snout and strong jaws?
questions.hintJp: 水辺にすむ はちゅうるい。口先が広く丸く、あごが強い。

questions.storyEn: This animal is a bird, but it cannot fly through the air. Instead, it uses its wings like flippers and swims under the water to catch food.
questions.questionEn: Which animal uses its wings like flippers?
questions.hintJp: 鳥だけど空を飛ばず、翼をひれのように使って泳ぐ。

questions.storyEn: This living thing has roots under the ground, a trunk above the ground, and branches with leaves. It can give shade on a sunny day.
questions.questionEn: What has roots, a trunk, branches, and leaves?
questions.hintJp: 根、幹、枝、葉がある。晴れの日に影を作る。

questions.storyEn: At night, this object can look round, half, or very thin. It is not a star, and it moves around Earth.
questions.questionEn: What moves around Earth and changes shape in the night sky?
questions.hintJp: 地球の周りを回る。夜空で丸く見えたり細く見えたりする。

questions.storyEn: You use this part of your body to hold a pencil, wave hello, clap, and touch things. It has fingers.
questions.hintJp: 鉛筆を持つ、手を振る、拍手する時に使う。指がある。

questions.storyEn: This body part helps you see colors, shapes, letters, and faces. You have two of them on your face.
questions.questionEn: Which body part helps you see?
questions.hintJp: 色、形、文字、人の顔を見るために使う。顔に二つある。

questions.storyEn: This vehicle usually has four wheels. People use it to travel on roads. It is smaller than a train and does not need rails.
questions.questionEn: Which vehicle travels on roads and does not need rails?
questions.hintJp: 道路を走る乗り物。ふつう4つのタイヤがある。線路はいらない。

questions.storyEn: When dark clouds are in the sky, drops of water may fall from them. People use umbrellas or raincoats to stay dry.
questions.questionEn: What falls from clouds as drops of water?
questions.hintJp: 雲から水のしずくが落ちてくる。かさやレインコートを使う。
ペンギンは泳ぐのが上手。
